title: anthemis parnassica var. pallida
intro: Anthemis parnassica var. pallida, also known as white yarrow, is a variety of the Anthemis parnassica plant, a flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which help to relieve pain, reduce fever, and ease digestive issues. The medicinal properties of white yarrow can provide health benefits such as reducing menstrual cramps, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. White yarrow is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
